angles.angle: impeccable harden.md/optimize.md/polish.md flows — residual audit craft not yet crosswalked into design-audit
impeccable per-model <codex>/<gemini> defect blocks at finer grain vs design-audit ai_fingerprint_tells
impeccable distill/clarify/bolder/quieter/delight flows vs design-interface — residual transformation craft
impeccable shared design-laws not yet adopted — residual numeric craft beyond the 13 already landed
/design:* generic arg-hint -> real per-mode arg grammar (md-gen url+path, audit target, motion component, foundations axis, interface brief+flags)
/design:* commands carry no concrete invocation example — add one real call + the artifact returned, per command
/design:* no when-to-use-vs-sibling discriminator (foundations vs interface, audit vs preflight) at the command layer
/design:* deliverable/output shape unspecified (only STATUS=OK/FAIL) — name the artifact (DESIGN.md, scored report, preflight card, build manifest)
/design:* failure modes/preconditions unnamed (md-gen needs Playwright+URL; audit needs built surface; motion needs a component)
command-as-mode vs command-as-task framing fork — should a /design:* command address an internal mode or a user intent?
granularity gap: which high-value task verbs (bolder/quieter/distill/harden/polish/delight/colorize/typeset) deserve first-class commands vs buried references
mode-internal sub-skills invisible at command layer (interface's 11 routed resources) — promote top ones to args/sibling commands?
no chaining/handoff between /design:* commands — surface the md-gen->foundations->interface->motion->audit pipeline
register (brand vs product) not pinnable at command entry though it gates density/motion/color/copy
command metadata drift — description/arg-hint/aliases triplicated across hub SKILL, mode-registry.json, command frontmatter; derive from one source + build-validate
command description as auto-trigger keyword surface — does the agent ever pick a specific /design:* command, or does it collapse to the hub (dead weight)?
/design:* allowed-tools over-grant (all grant Write/Edit/Bash though 4 modes are read-and-guide)
the missing hub-level deterministic router: hub->mode selection has no machine representation; project mode-registry.json into a parseable (prompt)->workflowMode router for replay
self-attested vs content-bound proof of utilization: proof must echo a value that exists only in the loaded file (or a content hash)
registry-as-source-of-truth is fictional at runtime (advisor doesn't read it; no hub executable) — resolve the never-hardcode vs hardcoded-default contradiction
ambiguous/multi-axis prompt resolution undefined — weighted hub scoring + ambiguity-delta + tie-break; multi-mode bundle as a first-class ordered output
negative routing: prove a design prompt ranks sk-design #1 and transports (figma/open-design) below it for taste intents
registry completeness + alias-collision static audit (every mode reachable; no alias owned by two modes; uncovered-intent rate)
utilization invisible in live dispatch (014 intentRecall=0) — a mandatory machine-readable mode-declaration token (ROUTED: workflowMode=...)
tool-permission correctness across the reference-base vs playwright-extract backendKind split — wrong mode = wrong tool surface
sub-agent/small-model dispatch utilization across the context boundary — out-of-band proof or pre-load-by-construction
a standing routing self-test gold corpus (prompt->expected workflowMode), hint-free + adversarial minimal pairs — the measurement engine
default-to-interface as a silent miss sink — separate routed from routed-correctly; measure false-default rate; ambiguous->ask vs silent default
four-copy intent-vocabulary drift (graph-metadata, hub SKILL prose, mode-registry aliases, mode INTENT_SIGNALS) — a drift gate
loaded vs applied: an output-diff witness — proof must name a concrete output choice traceable to a mode rule (not-loaded/loaded-inert/loaded-determinative)
routing observability/telemetry — log mode chosen/alias matched/bundle loaded/proof verdict, accumulate a measured miss-rate
wired-MCP direct-tool bypass: a PreToolUse matcher on the open-design MCP mutating tools so the precondition checks at the tool boundary
od CLI Bash bypass: a PreToolUse Bash matcher on daemon-cli.mjs write verbs (run start/ui respond/media generate)
the exemption is self-judged + post-hoc — define it on the tool, not the intent
the gate never executes (design_gate/require_sk_interface_design are pseudocode) — the minimum executable PreToolUse hook that returns deny
feeds_design_decision is caller-supplied + defaults False — invert to deny-by-default with a checkable positive exemption token
loaded != applied — bind start_run to a completed proof-of-application artifact (verdict READY), not skill presence
a machine-checkable run-scoped proof token = hash(project+brief+dials+critique verdict), TTL'd; forgery-resistant via critique-only artifacts
inner-generator context loss: start_run --agent spawns a second model with no sk-design — compile judgment INTO the brief + form answers
sub-agent/Task delegation laundering — the proof token must travel in the dispatch payload + re-validate at the child's tool boundary
exemption-as-allowlist inversion: enumerate transport-exempt calls (mcp install/doctor/daemon status/bare list); deny-by-default everything else; get_file of DESIGN.md is gated
temporal decay/freshness binding — proof token TTL + invalidate when brief/subject changes
headless automation time-bomb — od automation fires generation with no agent turn; gate at schedule-creation by freezing a proof token
HTTP/fourth-surface escape — only a daemon-side precondition on start_run covers all of CLI/MCP/HTTP/Skills
figma/open-design asymmetry — extract one shared design-transport-gate primitive both transports invoke
dispatch-contract asymmetry: cli-* have a code-standards ALWAYS rule but no design twin — add a Design Standards Loading ALWAYS rule
model the design manifest on the proven Gate-3 spec-folder pass-through (manifest present + sk-design loaded + register set, or ASK before dispatch)
the mcp-open-design pairing is parent-resident — must be re-asserted transport-side inside the CLI child
per-CLI coverage gap — re-home Template 16 as a shared system-spec-kit/references/cli/design_dispatch.md serving all three CLIs
smart-router blindness — add a DESIGN intent to each cli-* router (or ALWAYS baseline) so the design contract loads for a routine design prompt
skill reachability — codex/claude-code children can't resolve .opencode/skills paths; the manifest must declare path-resolvable vs inlined-payload
the advisor + co-surface graph edge don't cross the boundary — the parent must pre-resolve and bake the sk-design bundle into the dispatch
proof-of-application return path unparsed — a design failure_type in the agent-io result enum + a post-dispatch validator
multi-hop decay parent->CLI child->od inner generation agent — the brief+manifest must survive two boundaries into od run start --message
small-model design-blindness — fuse the sk-prompt-models profile with the design contract (a design-task scaffold per model profile)
AGENTS.md has no cross-CLI design-dispatch row — add the boundary-case routing rule
deterministic boundary checks as the silent-pass backstop — parent re-runs contrast_check.py + anti-slop sweep on returned artifacts
